Sunday Gatherings

Following Jesus Together In Anchorage

At Kaleo Church, our mission is to follow Jesus and help others do the same. We gather every Sunday at 10:00 AM in Midtown and South Anchorage.

Plan Your VisitWatch Live Stream

Kaleo Church

Kaleo Church in Anchorage, Alaska. Following Jesus together. Gathering on Sundays at 10:00 AM.
